title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Xpressbees

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Xpressbees
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
